name: io.github.ykarapazar/word-mcp-live
title: Word MCP Live
description: Live Microsoft Word editing via MCP — tracked changes, undo, comments, 40+ tools

environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTHOR
environmentVariables.description: Author name shown on tracked changes and comments (default: AI Assistant)

environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTHOR_INITIALS
environmentVariables.description: Author initials shown on comments (default: AI)
